iterations.ai_content: The 10 largest parcels in Drammen municipality larger than 5000 m² that intersect 200-year flood zones are led by parcel teigid 106202146 with an area of 775,773.6 m². Other identified parcels include teigid 336717531 (5,926.5 m²), 333372988 (13,349.9 m²), and 402763631 (14,286.2 m²).

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Drammen%'

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, lagretberegnetareal, geom FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_gis.teig WHERE kommunenummer = '3301' AND lagretberegnetareal > 5000

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [flomsoner]
